Renewal Teams — YTD (Jan–)
Team tiles populate from RM_ROSTER + RM_TARGETS + TEAM_YTD on refresh.
Two measures shown. The $ amount is closed-won ACV YTD by close date, displayed against annual 2026 quota — measures booking activity. The %, bucket, and pace gap use closed-won ACV YTD by effective start date, against the YTD-month quota (Jan–) — measures whether revenue is landing on the right cadence. Team rollups follow the rollup-math rule (manager rows ARE the team total).
RM Pacing — YTD (Jan–)
RM bucket grid populates from RM_ROSTER + RM_TARGETS + RM_YTD on refresh.
$ vs. % use different numerators. Big $ = close-date YTD closed-won (against annual quota). % bucket = effective-start-date YTD closed-won (against Jan– quota). Buckets: On / Ahead (≥100%) · Approaching (70–99%) · Behind (51–69%) · At risk (≤50%). Manager rows show as ICs with an "(individual)" suffix and ALSO contribute to their team's tile rollup above. Adj. rem = annual quota − close-date YTD ACV.

Pricing Summary —

Open Renewals to Price — click any row to expand reference detail; enter term, price, or uplift % to price the deal —

ⓘ Term toggle picks 1 / 2 / 3 years. Annual price is what you charge per year. Total contract value is shown next to it. Uplift % auto-calculates from prior closed-won ACV — type either value and the other syncs. Decisions save to your browser. Click "Export Pricing Decisions" to download a JSON file for Salesforce import.
Month: Up to 3 months
Team:
RM:

Churn Signals by RM — click any row to see the deals —

ⓘ Signal counts show how many opps each RM has flagged across the three categories (🔴 health · ⚠️ at-risk/DNR · ⛔ suspended). Total ACV is deduped — each opp counts once even if it shows multiple signals. Closed Won / Closed Lost opps are excluded (see CHANGELOG S18 for rationale).
